programs.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programs.desc: Four of the food world's fastest chefs compete in Guy Fieri's quickest game, Grocery Rush; they must create an upscale dinner in just 20 minutes before the bouncing balls select the mandatory protein.

programs.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programs.desc: Flavortown Market is overflowing with whammy ingredients, so Guy Fieri declares that the chefs will bank $2,500 for each whammy item they use.

programs.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programs.desc: Three chefs join forces with their spouses in a three-course competition where Guy Fieri tests their cooking chops and communication skills; the couples have one hour to make a date-night dinner with an on-the-fly dessert.

programs.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programs.desc: Guy Fieri is joined by "Chopped" host Ted Allen in the first-ever "Guy's Grocery Games" and "Chopped" mashup; Ted presents four "Chopped" champions with baskets full of wild ingredients he selected himself, and Guy serves up diabolical games.

programs.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programs.desc: Guy Fieri is turning up the heat in Flavortown as the returning winner defends their title against Franklin Becker and Allison Fasano; the chefs must ignite the taste buds of judges Dale Talde and Claudette Zepeda with their spiciest dishes.

programs.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programs.desc: Guy Fieri kicks off Game Day as the reigning champ faces Torrence Chef T Gregoire and Joe Flamm in tackling fan-favorite flavors; judges Marcel Vigneron and Marcus Samuelsson are calling the plays and only one chef can win up to $20,000.
